examples.title: Basic section heading
examples.description: A leveled section heading with description and actions, rendered without adding extra header landmarks.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { Button } from 'cinder/button';
  import { SectionHeading } from 'cinder/section-heading';
</script>

<SectionHeading
  title="Project overview"
  description="Track the current milestone, recent activity, and next steps."
>
  {#snippet actions()}
    <Button size="sm" variant="secondary" label="Share" />
  {/snippet}
</SectionHeading>
